typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Status} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'FileName',
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/P6/Project_Milestones/project_milestones*.csv']) ~> srcdfProjectMilestonesStage
srcdfProjectMilestonesStage derive(FileName = concat('Project_Data/NCSA/P6/Project_Milestones/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/','project_milestones_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		{Project ID } as string,
		{Activity ID} as string,
		{Activity Status} as string,
		{Activity Name} as string,
		{Original Duration} as string,
		Start as string,
		Finish as string,
		{Current date} as string,
		{% Complete} as string,
		Resource as string
	),
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkProjectMilestonesRaw
